text: The system shall respond to a POST /login request within 1000 milliseconds over a 10 Mbps connection.
The system shall encrypt user passwords using bcrypt with a cost factor of 12.
The system shall store user records in a PostgreSQL 16 database.
The system shall log every failed login attempt with timestamp and source IP address.
The system shall expire user sessions after exactly 30 minutes of inactivity.
The REST API shall respond to GET /users/{id} with the user record in less than 100 milliseconds.
The system shall enforce a minimum password length of 12 characters at registration.
The system shall reject usernames containing characters outside the set a-z A-Z 0-9 underscore.
The system shall emit a JSON event to Kafka topic on every new registration.
The system shall produce a daily backup of the database at 03:00 UTC to an S3 bucket.
